text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no mistaking Gold Ship's boisterous
laugh, and I can't help but check on her.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer! Look at the ground!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's a paper airplane at my feet, so I pick it up
and unfold it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A series of lines crisscross over the paper, and
scrawled in the middle are the words "Go, go,
Golshi!"

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: That's gotta be fan mail, right?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe it! I just folded it up along the
lines, and this puppy took off like a jet!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Whoever sent the fan letter sure knows Gold Ship
well. I guess they're not a fan for nothing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The fan's thoughtfulness and love for Gold Ship
renews my own motivation as a trainer.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Is that a twinkle I see in your eyes? You raring to
go? Well, I'm right there with ya!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hang on, I'll fold us a paper airplane big enough
to ride, and we can hop on and make straight for
the clouds!
